name: monitor_create
description: Create a new uptime monitor for a URL or IP address. Supports HTTP(s), keyword, ping, and port monitor types with configurable intervals and alert contacts.

parameters.name: friendly_name
parameters.description: A human-readable name for the monitor.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL or IP address to monitor.

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Monitoring interval in seconds (minimum 60 for free plan).

parameters.name: alert_contacts
parameters.description: Alert contact IDs and thresholds in format 'id_threshold_recurrence'.

parameters.name: keyword_value
parameters.description: For keyword monitors: the keyword to check for.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: For port monitors with sub_type 99: the custom port number.
